assertionResults.title: Replace Share 'Scan QR' fills bfonboard textarea

steps.expected: QR Scanner dialog opens
steps.observed: QR scanner dialog opened (role=dialog, aria-label=QR Scanner)

steps.action: Provide valid bfonboard QR payload via camera stream
steps.expected: Scanner closes and onboarding-package textarea is populated
steps.observed: Textarea value became bfonboard1... and scanner closed

steps.expected: Replace Share CTA enabled
steps.observed: Replace Share button became enabled

evidence.network: No assertion-relevant API/WS traffic required; route remained local on 127.0.0.1:5173

steps.expected: Scanner opens
steps.observed: Scanner opened

steps.expected: Scanner closes and onboarding textarea is populated
steps.observed: Onboarding Package textbox populated with bfonboard1... and dialog closed

steps.expected: Begin Onboarding becomes enabled
steps.observed: Begin Onboarding button became enabled

steps.expected: Scanner opens
steps.observed: Scanner opened

steps.expected: Scanner closes and Profile Backup textarea is populated
steps.observed: Profile Backup textbox populated with bfprofile1... and scanner closed

steps.action: Continue to /import/decrypt and fill Backup Password
steps.expected: Decrypt Backup CTA enabled once content + password are present
steps.observed: Decrypt Backup button became enabled

assertionResults.title: Camera permission denied falls back gracefully

steps.action: On /onboard, /import, and /replace-share reject getUserMedia and click Scan QR
steps.expected: Visible camera-denied/unavailable error and Close button; no crash/navigation
steps.observed: Each surface showed 'Camera access was denied or the camera is unavailable.' with Close button; URLs stayed on same route

steps.action: Close scanner and paste package text into textarea on each surface
steps.expected: Textarea remains editable and paste flow works without reload
steps.observed: Manual paste accepted on all three surfaces immediately after closing scanner

assertionResults.title: Invalid QR content surfaces inline error

steps.action: Open /onboard and scan invalid bfshare QR content
steps.expected: Inline validation error; textarea unchanged; no navigation
steps.observed: Scanner stayed open, showed 'Not a valid bfonboard package. Align a valid QR code within the frame.', textarea stayed empty, URL stayed /onboard

assertionResults.title: Mobile viewport works (or surfaces a clear desktop-only message)

steps.expected: Scan QR visible on all three surfaces
steps.observed: Scan QR button visible on all three routes

steps.action: On each route click Scan QR with denied camera
steps.expected: Clear unavailable message (no silent failure) OR operational scanner
steps.observed: All three showed explicit unavailable message 'Camera access was denied or the camera is unavailable.'; no silent failure

steps.action: Inspect getUserMedia constraints in mobile runs
steps.expected: facingMode environment requested when scanner opens
steps.observed: Captured constraints included {"video":{"facingMode":"environment"}}

assertionResults.title: Camera permission revoked mid-scan dismisses scanner cleanly

steps.action: Open scanner on /onboard with live stream and simulate revocation via MediaStreamTrack ended
steps.expected: Inline error appears and tracks end
steps.observed: After dispatching ended on live tracks, scanner showed 'Camera access was lost. Please re-enable camera permission and try again.'; track readyState values were ended

steps.expected: Scanner closable without freeze; textarea remains editable
steps.observed: Close action worked and onboarding textarea accepted manual input

assertionResults.title: Scanner releases camera on close / navigation

steps.action: Open scanner with live stream and capture pre-close track states
steps.expected: Tracks live before close
steps.observed: Latest scanner stream tracks were live before close

steps.expected: Tracks become ended and dialog closes
steps.observed: Tracks transitioned to ended and dialog unmounted

steps.expected: Fresh stream acquired with new live track(s)
steps.observed: Reopen created a new live track with different track id from previous stream

frictions.description: Headless validation environment has no physical camera stream, so camera flows required controlled getUserMedia/media-track simulation to exercise scan and revocation paths through the real UI.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval hooks to supply deterministic MediaStream/canvas-backed QR frames and explicit track-ended events while keeping route/UI behavior real.

summary: Tested 8 assigned backup QR/camera assertions: 8 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
